name: os-control-mcp
description: The sanctioned OS motor cortex for Linux — systemd, journald, logind, D-Bus — with a self-preservation guard.

plugins.name: os-control-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server (+ control-os skill) giving Claude sanctioned control of a Linux host: systemd services/timers, journald logs, host resources/processes, desktop notifications, D-Bus, and power — via systemctl/loginctl/journalctl/busctl, never raw PID hacks. Pure-stdlib, zero pip deps. Self-preservation guard blocks severing actions on units the agent stands on.
